title: Creepy Spruce Biome
description: This mod adds a creepy spruce biome,that brings back old minecraft horror videos vibe.
body: This mod adds a biome that has a creepy vibe,so you can: Prank your friends or Just enjoy it.Feel free to use this in any modpack.I will release it in neoforge if i have time for it.I created "Fullbright TXP".
